ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
noodle (80%) [wheat flour, palm fat, salt, sugar, stabilizers (potassium carbonate, sodium polyphosphate, cellulose gum), raising agent: sodium carbonate, turmeric extract,],
soup base (15%) [salt, sugar, refined palm oil, pepper, onion, garlic, chili, flavour enhancer: monoso dium glutamate, lotus leaf, synthetic shiitake flavor, syn - thetic lotus flavor, antioxidant: bha],
flavored oil (5%) [refined palm oil, antioxidants (bha, bht), mushroom flavour]
